data.title: Former New York Mayor’s NYC memecoin rugpulls investors at launch, and the method used was shockingly brazen
data.description:
Former New York mayor Eric Adams’ new NYC token fell more than 81% within about 30 minutes of its Jan. 12 launch on Solana, wiping out roughly $500 million in peak paper value. The token briefly reached an estimated market cap of $540 million–$600 million
source: https://cryptoslate.com/eric-adams-nyc-token-crashed-81-and-a-single-wallets-massive-70-holding-reveals-why-the-game-was-rigged/

data.title: NFT Paris 2026 cancelled: NFT crisis and fear on the Web3
data.description:
NFT Paris and RWA Paris 2026 are cancelled a month early. Amidst the collapse of the NFT market, fleeing sponsors and growing fears for personal safety, Europe's flagship Web3 event closes a historic chapter.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/nft/nft-paris-2026-cancelled-nft-crisis-and-fear-on-the-web3/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 930 USDT with a 2.85% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 13, 2026, 18:13 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 930 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 932.909973 USDT, with a narrowed 2.85% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Nigeria set to lead Africa with first economy-wide AI regulations
data.description:
Nigeria is preparing to approve legislation that will put the country at the forefront of African nations working to control artificial intelligence, marking a shift after tech companies operated with little supervision for years in one of the continent’s largest digital economies. The National Digital Economy and E-Governance Bill will hand regulators authority over data, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nigeria-set-to-lead-africa-with-first-economy-wide-ai-regulations/
